next_action: Run the v19 PowerShell script in an environment with DESI full-shape bindings (desi_y1_cosmo_bindings) + Planck likelihood code available. Configs are ready; runtime is the only remaining requirement. Blocker is environmental, NOT an APF derivation failure.

honest_claim_language.allowed: The exact APF2 full-shape runtime gate has been launched: official VAC YAMLs are converted into tabulated-w APF2 Cobaya configs, and the runner can execute them if the DESI full-shape likelihood bindings are locally available.
honest_claim_language.allowed_if_blocked: The exact full-shape run is blocked by missing external DESI likelihood code or Planck likelihood dependencies; the blocker is environmental/external, not an APF derivation failure.
forbidden: APF2 full-growth P is closed from VAC covmats or CPL projections alone.
The APF2 non-CPL model is equivalent to a CPL surrogate.
